description_long: This is an adult male pedestrian dressed in casual urban attire, featuring a dark zip-up jacket over a hooded sweatshirt and loose-fitting pants with bold graphic prints. The jacket appears to be made of a synthetic or canvas-like material, while the hoodie underneath adds a layered look. The pants are distinctive, with large, colorful text and graphic elements, giving a streetwear vibe. He is wearing dark sneakers, suitable for walking on city streets. His posture is upright with arms slightly outstretched, and his hair is closely cropped and neatly styled. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the overall appearance suggests a relaxed, everyday city dweller.
description: An adult male in casual streetwear, including a dark jacket, hoodie, graphic pants, and sneakers, standing upright with arms slightly out. The look is urban and relaxed, with no visible accessories.
description_view_0: Front view shows the man's face, dark jacket, light hoodie, and graphic pants with visible text and patterns.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the layered jacket and hoodie, and the loose fit of the pants.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the jacket with a large yellow graphic, the hood, and the back of the pants.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, jacket, and pants, with arm and hand details visible.
attribute_clothing_type: casual hooded sweatshirt, zip-up jacket, loose graphic pants
